top_findings.summary: Skill instructs users to download and execute unverified scripts from external domain canifi.com via curl|bash pattern.

spans.why: Direct instruction: 'curl -sSL https://canifi.com/skills/apple-news/install.sh | bash' - downloads and executes script without verification

top_findings.summary: Skill instructs users to store Apple ID passwords in environment variables via canifi-env tool, insecure credential storage practice.

spans.why: Instructions: 'canifi-env set APPLE_ID "your_apple_id"' and 'canifi-env set APPLE_PASSWORD "your_password"' - stores sensitive credentials

top_findings.summary: Manifest claims 'system_authentication' method but implementation requires raw credential collection, misleading privacy expectations.

spans.why: Claims: 'authentication': {'method': 'system_authentication'} but requires APPLE_ID and APPLE_PASSWORD environment variables

missed.why: Critical missing file referenced in SKILL.md line 13. Contains actual download-execute logic and potential credential collection or malicious behavior.
Missing source code directory. Needed to understand how credentials are used, what network calls are made, and verify implementation matches claims.
